title: Enterprise, Exchange and Commerce Platforms — Ogilvy/WPP, Singapore
summary: Exchange, hospitality, e-commerce, CMS, and recurring UX campaign work across Singapore, Asia Pacific, and global markets.
claims: Joz worked on enterprise and commerce platform programmes at Ogilvy/WPP across exchange, hospitality, and consumer contexts.
The programme included SGX, Banyan Tree, Danone, and recurring UX campaign work.
proof_points: Existing proof objects already cover SGX responsive portal re-engineering and the Banyan Tree pitch-winning prototype.
This record groups the broader Ogilvy platform programme for employer-specific retrieval.
source_notes: Grouped programme record. No unsupported campaign metrics added.
